_instructions: Copy this file to customer_config.json and fill in your organization details. These mappings ensure your org names, domains, and IDs are consistently sanitized across all records.

organizations._comment: Map your Precinct org slugs (as they appear in Cassandra) to sanitized replacements.

organization_display_names._comment: Map display names (as they appear in log data) to the same sanitized tokens.

customer_domains: _comment: List all domains owned by your organization(s) that should be sanitized.

organization_ids._comment: Map Precinct orgId integers to sanitized sequential IDs.
